examples: I went to a tryst last night.
A kind of orchestral motorik beat on "Tryst with Mephistopheles".
The home is a tryst-the place where we retire and shut the world out.
The Star was unsure which day his tryst with Ms Coghlan was alleged to have occurred.
My lodgings were lovely, and I'm all for hot water, but it was no place for a tryst.
